title: CurseBlades
description: A Unique Plugin for SMP Servers and Creative Content
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FbwNrwSAGLA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe># **Cursed Katanas**

**Cursed Katanas** is a combat-focused Minecraft plugin for **1.21–1.21.10** that introduces three powerful cursed katanas into the game. Each katana is designed with unique abilities, cooldown systems, crafting recipes, and custom visual effects to make combat more intense, dangerous, and visually impactful while remaining easy to understand.

---

# **Features**

Here is a basic rundown of what this plugin includes.

- **Void Reaper**  
  A void-infused katana built for chaos and disruption. Its **passive ability** launches enemies **4 blocks into the air** on hit, while its **active ability** summons **TNT-carrying chickens from the sky** that explode on impact.

- **Eternal Nightmare**  
  A life-stealing cursed blade focused on sustain-based combat. Its **passive ability** drains **4 health from enemies on hit** and transfers it directly to the wielder, making it extremely effective in prolonged fights.

- **Celestial Annihilator**  
  A celestial-powered katana designed to weaken and punish enemies. Its **active ability** calls down **lightning strikes** on enemies, while its **passive ability** gradually **reduces enemy energy** during combat.

- **Additional Mechanics**  
  Each katana has **unique cooldowns**, **separate crafting recipes**, and **custom holding particles**, ensuring every weapon feels distinct and dangerous.

---

# **Compatibility**

This plugin supports **Minecraft 1.21 – 1.21.10** and is optimized for **PvP, SMP, and RPG servers** with minimal performance impact.

---

# **FAQ**

- **Is this plugin balanced for survival and PvP?**  
  Yes, all abilities are balanced with cooldowns to keep gameplay fair.

- **Do all katanas have the same abilities?**  
  No, each katana has completely different abilities and playstyles.

- **Will this plugin affect server performance?**  
  No, the plugin is lightweight and optimized for smooth gameplay.
